variables.notes: No COGS row was selected earlier, and the statement looks investment/overhead-oriented rather than product-cost oriented. The visible D&A rows are not clearly cost-of-sales related, so none should be added to COGS.

candidates.why: This is a separate operating D&A line above EBIT at the same level as the selected overhead component rows. Since XSGA_COMPONENTS currently includes Development expense, Other Other external expenses, and Personnel costs, this depreciation line appears outside those selected rows and should be added separately.

This is a separate operating D&A line above EBIT at the same level as the selected overhead component rows. It does not appear to be a subcomponent of the selected XSGA rows, so it should be added separately.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA_COMPONENTS did not include any depreciation/amortisation rows. Both visible depreciation rows are separate operating expense lines above EBIT and should be added separately to the XSGA bucket. No higher-level D&A summary row is visible, so include both components.
